cards.title: User Activity Review
cards.detail: Observe page usage and product flow without invasive tracking language.

cards.title: Feature Usage
cards.detail: Understand which product layers users engage with most often.

cards.title: Retention Signals
cards.detail: Track continued use of Review, Academy, and Reports over time.

cards.title: Admin Oversight Metrics
cards.detail: Summaries for approvals, active users, and system growth.

guardrails: No public scoreboards or behavioral shaming.
Analytics should support product clarity and operational health.
